name: Conduct Problems Assessment
description: Evaluates rule-breaking behavior, defiance, and authority issues

questions.text: Do you often break rules or ignore instructions?
Do you frequently argue with authority figures?
Do you skip school or work without permission?
Do you lie to avoid getting in trouble?
Do you take things that don't belong to you?
Do you deliberately damage other people's property?

terminationRules.name: Early Conduct Screening
terminationRules.description: Skip remaining questions if no initial conduct concerns
